item.title: We are a nation of immigrants
item.description: I’d trade now Captain Idrache for any or all of these lying, treasonous RedHats and Fat Nixon as well. We are a nation of immigrants, a truth to be embraced not reviled. https://www.dvidshub.net/news/199082/port-au-prince-west-point-maryland-guards-first-graduate Captain Idrache as of 2021. https://www.southcom.mil/MEDIA/NEWS-ARTICLES/Article/2783312/haitian-born-black-hawk-pilot-supports-jtf-haiti-earthquake-relief-efforts/

item.dc:creator: IRideUponAPaleHorse

item.title: Ukraine did it again. Weapon depot in Toropets gone earthquake 2.8-boom
item.description: Ukraine destroyed one of Russia’s largest weapons depots. A drone swarm struck the depot in Toropets in the Tver region, 480 km from the frontlines. The explosion destroyed hundreds of S-300, S-400, Iskander & North Korean ballistic missiles, causing a 2.8 magnitude earthquake https://www.volcanodiscovery.com/place/33374/earthquakes/toropets.html
item.dc:creator: vladrichdemaclant

item.title: These bottom shelf memes are not secure
item.description:
He's beautiful @JKBenton ❤️
Unhinged decor is the only appropriate way.
@HileyNoteson Yoooooooooooooooooooooo
Here's my #wallpaper for the sake of the theme..
WE DID IT, GUYS! WE FINALLY DELETED https://discord.gg/bottomshelfvodka You're welcome.
But you can catch Deaf Cat Magoo (short for Oogala Magoogala) on https://twitch.tv/bottomshelfvodka

item.title: This man stayed with the most loyal being

item.title: Wednesday Wholesome Dump #118 (If you're having a bad day, I got you)
item.description:
1. That filter is hilarious, Disney should remake all of it's live action films in this style!
2. Tiny Cheeseburger (What is this, a cheeseburger for Ants?)
3. Who else felt inspired by Superheros to be kinder as a kid (and maybe as an adult)?
4
5. Every time he comes back home
6. A loving friendship
7. The average morning of a cat owner, or I should say Human Owner
8. Good boy just want's to hug you
9. Interesting moment as a parent correct aggressive behavior
10. Cheese good? Good! Where more cheese?
11. These ladies are amazing! Probably the Best 90's cartoon theme? Along with The Batman cartoon?
12. Let me show you the dance of my people
13. Polite red panda eating food politely
14. ONWARD MIGHT STEED
15. Hello friendos, for the past year and a half, I’ve been working on a game that’s very close to my heart. "Do Not Press The Button (To Delete The Multiverse)" is a quirky adventure crafted with love and passion, with my brother by my side, helping every step of the way. It was inspired by games like The Stanley Parable. As indie developers, we rely on your support to bring our game to life. By adding it to your wishlist, you’re helping us reach more players and make a big impact in the gaming community. https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120/Do_Not_Press_The_Button_To_Delete_The_Multiverse/ We can’t do this without you! Thank you for supporting our dream and helping us share our wild adventure with the world!
item.dc:creator: TheseusGames

item.title: Images of Note: THE SYSTEM WILL SHUT DOWN NOW
item.description:
AS A GIRL!
hell yeah
Right now I'm listening to Good Luck Babe and I recommend it, it's very sapphic.
Don't forget Linux
THE ARCH SLANDER WILL CONTINUE! JUST USE UBUNTU OR MINT! STOP THE STRESS.
>:3
*Toad voice* "Wait, that's an option?"
h o n s e
This is going to be the first of many thomas the tank engine memes in the dump. DON'T FUCKIN' JUDGE ME, THE MEMES ON THE TTTE TAG WERE FIRE!
OnO
Best love story.
BASICALLY
It's real Coelacanth hours
Oh
His name wasn't even Anderson.
:D
I know someone called Ben, are they in this cult?
:D
http://discord.abbii.gay: For Chats http://twitch.abbii.gay: For Stream http://tumblr.abbii.gay: For shitposts http://mastodon.abbii.gay: For microblogging
item.dc:creator: abbiistabbii
